description: Block-form <match> arm round-trip (§18.0.1). Idle -> Loading -> Ready -> Idle via three clicks; the dispatcher swaps the mounted arm each time and correctly RE-MOUNTS the idle arm after it was torn down. Final state Idle, only the idle arm present.
rationale: §18.0.1 repeated arm swaps must tear down the prior arm and re-mount the target; returning to the initial arm re-renders it cleanly (no stale Loading/Ready bodies linger).
